requirement_topic.en: Cell and battery pack safety: IEC 62133 / ASEAN-adopted basis
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全：IEC 62133 / ASEAN采标基础
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全：IEC 62133 / ASEAN採標基礎

summary.en: For portable lithium cells, battery packs, and power banks, Laos commonly relies on IEC and ASEAN-adopted standards rather than a separate national lithium-battery technical code. IEC 62133 evidence is the practical safety anchor, but exporters must confirm the exact DOSM conformity route and whether a Laos-adopted version or certification body instruction applies to the product model.
summary.zh: 对便携式锂电芯、电池组及移动电源，老挝通常依托IEC及ASEAN采标标准，而不是单独的国家锂电池技术规范。IEC 62133证据是实务上的安全锚点，但出口商必须确认具体DOSM合格评定路径，以及是否适用老挝采纳版本或认证机构对该型号的指示。
summary.zht: 對便攜式鋰電芯、電池組及行動電源，寮國通常依託IEC及ASEAN採標標準，而不是單獨的國家鋰電池技術規範。IEC 62133證據是實務上的安全錨點，但出口商必須確認具體DOSM合格評定路徑，以及是否適用寮國採納版本或認證機構對該型號的指示。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62133 series for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries
ASEAN-adopted battery or electrical safety standards where adopted by Laos
DOSM conformity certification for regulated goods where in scope

summary.en: China's baseline is GB 31241 for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries used in portable electronic equipment, with CCC where applicable. GB 31241 evidence can support a technical comparison, but Laos-facing files should still include IEC 62133 or locally accepted safety evidence if DOSM or the importer requests it.
summary.zh: 中国基线为便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池的GB 31241，适用时包括CCC。GB 31241证据可支持技术对照，但如DOSM或进口商要求，面向老挝的文件仍应包含IEC 62133或当地认可的安全证据。
summary.zht: 中國基線為便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池的GB 31241，適用時包括CCC。GB 31241證據可支持技術對照，但如DOSM或進口商要求，面向寮國的文件仍應包含IEC 62133或當地認可的安全證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment

gap.en: The main technical gap is standard basis and acceptance. A GB 31241 report is not automatically a Laos DOSM certificate or an IEC 62133 report. Build a model-specific file with IEC 62133 test evidence, labels, safety data, and importer documentation before seeking Laos conformity confirmation.
gap.zh: 主要技术差距在标准基础及接受方式。GB 31241报告不会自动成为老挝DOSM证书或IEC 62133报告。申请老挝合格确认前，应建立按型号对应的文件包，包括IEC 62133测试证据、标签、安全资料及进口商文件。
gap.zht: 主要技術差距在標準基礎及接受方式。GB 31241報告不會自動成為寮國DOSM證書或IEC 62133報告。申請寮國合格確認前，應建立按型號對應的文件包，包括IEC 62133測試證據、標籤、安全資料及進口商文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the product is inside DOSM regulated-goods scope; IEC 62133 is the practical safety basis to verify with DOSM/importer.
mandatory_status.cn: GB 31241 baseline and CCC where applicable for China domestic scope.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare IEC 62133 evidence for Laos even if the China file already has GB 31241. Confirm whether DOSM requires local certification, document review, or importer-led conformity for the exact model.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 即使中国文件已有GB 31241，也应为老挝准备IEC 62133证据。请确认DOSM对具体型号要求本地认证、文件审核还是进口商主导合格评定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 即使中國文件已有GB 31241，也應為寮國準備IEC 62133證據。請確認DOSM對具體型號要求本地認證、文件審核還是進口商主導合格評定。
